name: Password Spraying - Failed Logons Across Multiple Accounts From Single Source
description: Detects password spraying by identifying a single source IP generating failed logon attempts across many distinct accounts. Covers spray attacks via SMB, RDP, OWA, ADFS, and Kerberos.
query: event.code: ("4625" or "4771") and winlog.event_data.Status: ("0xC000006D" or "0xC000006A" or "0x18") and not winlog.event_data.TargetUserName: (SYSTEM or HEALTH*)
